news.title: Brent oil heads for record monthly surge, WTI settles above $100 for first time since 2022
news.title_cn: 布蘭特原油月度漲幅創歷史新高，WTI自2022年以來首次突破100美元

news.title: China suppliers warn of higher prices for Americans due to Strait of Hormuz closure
news.title_cn: 中國供應商警告稱，由於霍爾木茲海峽關閉，美國的價格將上漲

news.title: Bill Ackman says it’s one of the best times in a long time to buy quality stocks
news.title_cn: 比爾阿克曼表示，這是長期以來購買優質股票的最佳時機之一

news.title: Powell sees inflation outlook in check, no need to hike rates because of oil shock

news.title_cn: 過去一個月油價上漲超過 50% 可能不僅僅是「短暫的衝擊」。

news.title: Microsoft’s stock may extend a record stretch of lagging performance that’s ignited fierce debate
